_comment: Emailed bid leads (BAS-5): keyword-alert invitations from the Group 1 portals (PlanHub, BuildingConnected, BidNet Direct) transcribed by Meri into ISRDS_Bid_Requests_Inbox.xlsx. Parsed to deterministic raw records by scripts/parse_bas5_inbox.py; ingested by FileDropAdapter through the full pipeline (normalize → dedup → gate → commit). Unknown fields stay null per Data Contract v1.0. Replace with AlertEmailAdapter (IMAP) once the shared-mailbox credentials land.
name: Emailed Bid Leads (BAS-5)
